paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.48, with a change of -1.52% compared to the prior close and -25.43% over the last 22 trading sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, dated July 23, 2026. This news item is related to the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form filed on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there is one Form 4 filing in the feed.
